description: Hacker News from your terminal — with a local store, full-text search, and agent-native output no other HN tool has

tools.name: items_get
tools.description: Get details for a specific story, comment, job, or poll. Required: itemId. Returns the Item.

tools.name: maxitem_get
tools.description: Returns the largest item ID currently assigned by Hacker News.

tools.name: stories_ask
tools.description: Get the latest Ask HN posts. Optional: limit (default: 30). Returns array of StoryID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.name: stories_best
tools.description: Get the highest-voted stories on Hacker News. Optional: limit (default: 30). Returns array of StoryID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.name: stories_job
tools.description: Get the latest Hacker News job postings. Optional: limit (default: 30). Returns array of StoryID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.name: stories_new
tools.description: Get the newest stories on Hacker News. Optional: limit (default: 30). Returns array of StoryID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 500)

tools.name: stories_show
tools.description: Get the latest Show HN posts. Optional: limit (default: 30). Returns array of StoryID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.name: stories_top
tools.description: Get the current top stories on Hacker News. Optional: limit (default: 30). Returns array of StoryID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 500)

tools.name: updates_list
tools.description: Items and user profiles that have changed recently. Returns the Updates.

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: Get a user's profile including karma and submission history. Required: userId. Returns the User.
